requirements: The valve body must be made from 316 stainless steel for corrosion resistance.
The assembly must handle a maximum pressure of 500 PSI.
Compliance with ASME B16.34 is required for high-pressure service.
O-rings must be Viton-brand to withstand temperatures up to 200°C.
Valve shall have a fail-safe closed mechanism on loss of air pressure.
The stem packing shall be adjustable without disassembly.
Body thickness must meet minimum ASME wall thickness calculations.
NPT threaded ends must match standard pipe fit specifications.
External surfaces shall be powder-coated for atmospheric protection.
Leakage rate must not exceed API 6D tight shutoff standards.
Lifting eyes must be integrated for crane-based installation.
The handle shall be padlockable in both open and closed positions.
nfrs: Valve must operate for 50,000 cycles without significant seal fatigue.
Safety factor of 1.5x must be applied to all pressure-bearing walls.
Component must fit within a 300mm x 300mm envelope.
Design must be documented in STEP and DWG CAD formats.

BOM (Bill of Materials) Constraints.text: No conflict minerals in raw parts

Project Timeline & Prototyping.text: Pilot run of 100 units by Q3

requirements: The caliper must be manufactured via aluminum die-casting for weight.
Fatigue testing shall exceed 1 million cycles at peak pedal force.
Surface finish must be anodized to prevent galvanic corrosion.
Hydraulic seals must meet SAE J1603 material specifications.
Bleed valves shall be accessible from a standard mechanic position.
The caliper must support ventilated rotor thicknesses from 20-25mm.
Mounting bolt pattern shall follow Euro-standard SUV specifications.
Brake pad replacement must be possible without removing the caliper body.
Heat dissipation fins must be integrated into the hydraulic housing.
The assembly shall include integrated wear sensors.
Pistons must be hard-chrome plated for low-friction operation.
Maximum deflection under full load shall not exceed 0.2mm.
nfrs: Total weight of the caliper must not exceed 2.5kg.
Design must meet SAE J1153 brake performance standards.
Thermal expansion must be managed for stable braking at 500°C.
Salt spray resistance shall be tested per ISO 9227 standards.

Safety Factors & Structural Integrity.text: Factor of Safety for fatigue life of 2.0

Environmental Operating Conditions.text: Extreme road salt and moisture exposure

requirements: The compressor must be a scroll-type for quiet commercial operation.
Vibration isolators shall reduce noise transmission to less than 65dB.
Thermal overload protection must be built-in with automatic reset.
Compressor must be compatible with R-410A and R-32 refrigerants.
Liquid-injection cooling shall be used for high-ambient operations.
The unit shall include an integrated sight glass for oil level check.
Connection ports must be brazed copper for leak-free sealing.
Compressor motor shall be variable-speed for energy efficiency.
System must support vertical and horizontal mounting configuration.
Internal pressure relief valve shall trigger at 650 PSI.
Crankcase heater must prevent liquid slugging during cold starts.
Inlet and outlet shall include integrated service valves.
nfrs: Energy Efficiency Ratio (EER) must exceed 12.0.
Unit shall have a design life of 15 years under normal duty.
Maximum weight must allow for rooftop crane placement.
Corrosion-resistant coating must pass 1000-hour ASTM B117 salt spray.

requirements: The pump must deliver a flow rate of 100 GPM at 3,000 RPM.
Hydraulic seals must handle 5,000 PSI operating pressure.
Shaft design shall include standard SAE splines for drivetrain coupling.
Contamination resistance must meet ISO 4406 18/16/13 class.
Pump shall include an internal pressure compensator.
Porting shall use standard SAE O-ring boss (ORB) threads.
Integrated bypass valve must facilitate easy cold-start unloading.
Casing must be made of high-strength nodular cast iron.
Flow control valve shall be adjustable via a manual knob.
Pump must be compatible with biodegradable hydraulic fluids.
Inlet port must be oversized to prevent cavitation at high RPM.
Mounting flange shall be SAE B-standard with 2-bolt pattern.
nfrs: Volumetric efficiency must be above 95% at full load.
Operating noise levels must not exceed 80dBA at 1 meter.
Pump must survive a 10g vertical shock load while operational.
Startup temperature limit must be as low as -40°C.

Safety Factors & Structural Integrity.text: Casing FEA for peak cyclical pulse

requirements: The bracket must be machined from Ti-6Al-4V titanium alloy.
Weight must be minimized using generative design and FEA lattice.
Compliance with FAA DO-160 for environmental testing is required.
Static load testing must prove no permanent deformation at limit load.
Hole locations must maintain a tolerance of +/- 0.05mm.
Surface finish must meet AS9100 aerospace standards.
The bracket shall include integrated nut-plates for blind installation.
Design must avoid all sharp edges to minimize stress risers.
All dimensions shall be verified using CMM inspection.
Material must have full traceability back to the mill batch.
Riveting pattern shall follow standard aerospace pitch rules.
Bracket must withstand temperatures from -60°C to 150°C.
nfrs: Ultimate safety factor of 1.5 against rupture must be proven.
Part must be 20% lighter than its aluminum predecessor.
Design life must exceed 20,000 flight hours.
Manufacturing must utilize 5-axis CNC to minimize setup errors.

Safety Factors & Structural Integrity.text: Dynamic modal analysis to avoid resonance
